title: Savory Russian Pancakes
description: A traditional Russian dish made with a twist of savory flavors, served with a side of spicy sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour and rice.
Add savory seasoning and mix well.
Gradually add water to form a thick batter.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour 1/4 cup of the batter into the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Flip the pancake and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
Serve the pancakes hot with a side of spicy sauce.
